texto: Active critical reflection is necessary in every aspect of our teaching, not only in front of a class. We must try to reevaluate our own values and experiences as they relate to our teaching. Our assumptions and theories about teaching composition must remain open to inspection, evaluation, and revision, a condition that requires an active inquiry paralleling the inquiry in which we engage our students.
explicacao: Orientação direta de George Hillocks sobre temas ligados a educacao. A afirmação “Active critical reflection is necessary in every aspect of our teaching, not only in front of a c…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, reflective-practice, teaching, útil em momentos de teaching e writing.
